languages.text: "Я буду очень надеяться, что вы совершили это по незнанию, Вольный Торговец". {n}Голос дознавателя тих и спокоен, но бьющаяся на лбу Хейнрикса жилка выдает его бешенство.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я буду очень надеяться, что вы совершили это по незнанию, Вольный Торговец". {n}Голос дознавателя тих и спокоен, но бьющаяся на лбу Хейнрикса жилка выдает его бешенство.{/n}
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}

languages.text: “我衷心希望您这举动只是出于无知，行商浪人。”{n}海因里希的声音平静而克制，但额角暴起的青筋暴露了他真正的情绪。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我衷心希望您这举动只是出于无知，行商浪人。”{n}海因里希的声音平静而克制，但额角暴起的青筋暴露了他真正的情绪。{/n}

languages.text: «Espero sinceramente que este acto provenga únicamente de la ignorancia, Comerciante». {n}La voz de Heinrix es queda y tranquila, pero la vena que palpita en su frente revela sus verdaderas emociones.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Espero sinceramente que este acto provenga únicamente de la ignorancia, Comerciante». {n}La voz de Heinrix es queda y tranquila, pero la vena que palpita en su frente revela sus verdaderas emociones.{/n}

languages.text: « J'espère sincèrement que cet acte était motivé par l'ignorance, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}La voix d'Heinrix est calme, mais la veine pulsant sur son front trahit ses véritables émotions.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'espère sincèrement que cet acte était motivé par l'ignorance, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}La voix d'Heinrix est calme, mais la veine pulsant sur son front trahit ses véritables émotions.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu eylemin cehaletten doğduğunu içtenlikle umuyorum Hür Tacir." {n}Heinrix'in sesi sessiz ve sakin çıksa da alnında atan damar, gerçek duygularını ele veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu eylemin cehaletten doğduğunu içtenlikle umuyorum Hür Tacir." {n}Heinrix'in sesi sessiz ve sakin çıksa da alnında atan damar, gerçek duygularını ele veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich hoffe wirklich, das ist aus Ignoranz passiert, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Heinrixs Stimme ist leise und ruhig, aber die auf seiner Stirn pulsierende Vene verrät seine wahren Gefühle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich hoffe wirklich, das ist aus Ignoranz passiert, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Heinrixs Stimme ist leise und ruhig, aber die auf seiner Stirn pulsierende Vene verrät seine wahren Gefühle.{/n}

languages.text: 「この行為が、無知から生まれたことを心より願っています、ローグトレーダー。」{n}ヘインリヒスの声は静かで穏やかだが、額の血管が脈打つ様子は彼の真の感情を物語る.{/n}
